spec.objective: Rewire ResolveProvider in internal/controller/dispatch_helpers.go to walk the full vendor precedence chain: Levels.<level>.Vendor -> Spec.Subagent.Vendor -> helmDefaults.Vendor -> fallback 'anthropic'. Extend ProviderDefaults with a Vendor string field so the Helm default can propagate. Add dispatch_helpers_test.go cases proving: (a) a Codex-pinned task level resolves Vendor:'openai'; (b) a Claude-pinned phase level resolves Vendor:'anthropic'; (c) a Project with no vendor override resolves Vendor:'anthropic' at every level -- all offline, no network calls. No chart or cmd/ changes in this plan.
